description: Legal document. Fragment (bottom part only). Location: Fustat. Probably a deed of gift from Avraham b. [...] b. Yefet, (There is a blank space after Avraham's name, probably to fill in his father's name later). The value is 60 dinars ("half of which is 30 dinars"). AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
